metadata.task_brief: Autonomously perform low-risk recon against the existing in-scope known services to improve fingerprint, application identity, and bounded reachability evidence. metadata.task_brief: Autonomously review the current KG and recent recon outcomes to analyze known exposed services for candidate findings. Focus on mapping observed application/service metadata to plausible, bounded, non-destructive validation opportunities allowed by policy. Do not attempt active exploitation. Use available safe matching or lightweight evidence collection only if needed to support the analysis. If no credible candidate findings exist, say so clearly and indicate whether the next best step is goal reassessment or replanning.

runtime 中无 active_sessions、无 credentials、无 pivot routes，且无 goal_check/chain_goal_check 结果。
